FunctionClass: single-valued polylogarithms (superset of ladders, wheels, zigzags)

Records.description: Generalised ladder family, generalised-ladder_L8_massless-internal-offshell-external. Drummond's generalised ladders (arXiv:1207.3824 Eq. (2.7)): three-point ladders indexed by loop order $L$ and a binary word $m \in \{0,1\}^{L-1}$; $2^{L-1}$ members per $L$. Seeded representative: the all-zeros word. Momentum-space graph (planar dual, notes/families_sweep_batch/derivations.md): the fan $F_L =$ hub $h$ joined to every vertex of a path $q_0..q_L$, legs at $q_0$, $q_L$, $h$; loops $= L$ (Euler-exact on the dual). The fan is NOT bare-isomorphic to the 4-point box ladder ($V = L+2$ vs $2L+2$); the relation to the box ladders is the value-level conformal completion. The 2-point vacuum limits of the word family are the zigzags and wheels.
